Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Andres Rodriquez' Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoena For Production Of Business Records For Barbara Berkeley, D.C. And,Or For Contempt; Request For Sanctions Of Not Less Than $1,500 And, Or Penalties Of At Least $1,000 is off calendar, per the request of the moving party. A Notice Of Withdrawal Of Motion To Compel was filed on April 2, 2018. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Deft Andres Reyes Rodrigues To Pltf'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft And Its Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Leah Edwards' Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Andres Reyes Rodrigues To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Request For Admission; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record (For Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Andres Reyes Rodrigues To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Request For Admission; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counselor Of Record
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory Geiger, Esq. of the Law Office of Gregory C. Cattermole, Tel. 650.345.6811, for plaintiff and moving party;
Bahareh Habibi, Esq. of Ford, Walker, Haggerty & Behar, Tel. 562.983.2500, for defendant and opposing party, by Court Call.

Both parties stipualted to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LEAH EDWARDS' Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Andres Reyes Rodrigues To First Set Of Request For Admission; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record is granted. [See the court's tentative ruling for details.] In additon, the Court grants plaintiff's request for sanction in the amount of $990 and sustains defendant's objection as to request for admissions. The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order in comliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
